positive: An abstract, stylized depiction of a mystical woodland scene: towering ancient trees with intricate, glowing roots, illuminated by soft, bioluminescent fireflies and ethereal moonlight. Focus on a central composition of entwined nature elements and stylized animal silhouettes (deer, fox, owl) peeking through the canopy. The aesthetic should be detailed line art mixed with vibrant, moody gradients, using deep emerald greens, midnight blues, and pops of glowing gold/cyan. High contrast black and white line work is preferred for maximum versatility, but subtle color saturation can enhance the magic. Ideal for a repeating, printable textile design. Seamless pattern potential.
negative: blur, grain, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, lowres, abstractism, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, poor composition, dull colors
